channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: Funding cuts and program changes required by President Trump…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Funding cuts and program changes required by President Trump's big budget law are forcing states to rethink bipartisan efforts to bring Medicaid into jails and prisons. n.pr/4fujAAo
item.content:encoded: Funding cuts and program changes required by President Trump's big budget law are forcing states to rethink bipartisan efforts to bring Medicaid into jails and prisons. n.pr/4fujAAo

item.title: Heading to Georgia on Wednesday, President Trump is campaign…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Heading to Georgia on Wednesday, President Trump is campaigning more often this year than he did in the same period for 2018 and has already rallied for a dozen candidates in toss-up races. n.pr/4wgwedc
item.content:encoded: Heading to Georgia on Wednesday, President Trump is campaigning more often this year than he did in the same period for 2018 and has already rallied for a dozen candidates in toss-up races. n.pr/4wgwedc

item.title: DJ ALAN SHIRAHAMAこと白濱亜嵐 レーベル移籍第1弾シングルの配信日決定🔥 https://nata…
item.author: 音楽ナタリー (@music.natalie.mu)
item.description:
DJ ALAN SHIRAHAMAこと白濱亜嵐
レーベル移籍第1弾シングルの配信日決定🔥
https://natalie.mu/music/news/681914?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

“ダニエルの姉”オリヴィア・マーシュ参加の楽曲
「Not Enough（feat. Olivia Marsh）」
item.content:encoded:
DJ ALAN SHIRAHAMAこと白濱亜嵐

item.title: New York Mayor Mamdani said the city would not be able to ex…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: New York Mayor Mamdani said the city would not be able to execute an arrest warrant issued by the top war-crimes court for Israel's Benjamin Netanyahu, but urged the federal government to do so. n.pr/4pvQcOC
item.content:encoded: New York Mayor Mamdani said the city would not be able to execute an arrest warrant issued by the top war-crimes court for Israel's Benjamin Netanyahu, but urged the federal government to do so. n.pr/4pvQcOC

item.title: The move makes France the first country in the European Unio…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The move makes France the first country in the European Union to pass a blanket ban on platforms as concerns grow worldwide over the harmful effects of digital content on kids. n.pr/3TMwz94
item.content:encoded: The move makes France the first country in the European Union to pass a blanket ban on platforms as concerns grow worldwide over the harmful effects of digital content on kids. n.pr/3TMwz94

item.title: About 24% of U.S. employees stay in unwanted jobs just for h…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: About 24% of U.S. employees stay in unwanted jobs just for health insurance, a report out Wednesday finds. Up significantly since 2021, the uptick in "job lock" is a concerning sign for the U.S. economy. n.pr/4gQIY5E
item.content:encoded: About 24% of U.S. employees stay in unwanted jobs just for health insurance, a report out Wednesday finds. Up significantly since 2021, the uptick in "job lock" is a concerning sign for the U.S. economy. n.pr/4gQIY5E
